results.title: Bordeaux 2025: The best wines from Margaux's 'miracle vintage'
results.content: Small berries were universal (‘as small as 2022’). For Château Margaux, 2025 will represent the smallest volume of grand vin production since 1856 with only 37% of the total yield of 22hl/ha going into the top wine.
